---
title: "Team Agency Mapping"
author: "Jacqueline and Farida"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r load}
library(tidyverse)
library(readr)
library(here)
install.packages("cfbfastR")
library(cfbfastR)
```

## Replicating core analysis

```{r}
## Create table joining city_name, school, state and OIR

```

```{r}
## Load Offense Data

```
